Who We Are

HomeAbout UsWho We Are
2006Serving Somalia since
About Us

AABOW Group of Companies

AABOW GROUP OF COMPANIES is a diversified Somali-owned company established in 2006, specializing in construction, engineering, real estate development, logistics, general supplies, procurement, and infrastructure services. The company has successfully implemented projects for government institutions, international organizations, NGOs, and private sector clients across Somalia.

We have built a strong reputation for delivering high-quality construction and infrastructure projects — roads, bridges, boreholes, irrigation canals, hospitals, markets, residential and commercial buildings, and rehabilitation works. In addition to contracting services, AABOW GROUP is actively involved in real estate development, import and export services, logistics support, and supply chain management.

With a team of experienced engineers, project managers, technical experts, and skilled laborers, AABOW GROUP OF COMPANIES is committed to professionalism, innovation, quality assurance, and client satisfaction in every project undertaken.

  • ✓Experienced engineers, project managers & technical experts
  • ✓Documented Quality Management System (QMS)
  • ✓Offices in Mogadishu, Nairobi, Dubai & China
Our Vision & Mission

Vision, Mission & Values

HomeAbout UsVision, Mission & Values

🎯Vision

To become a leading and trusted contracting, engineering, infrastructure, and supply company in Somalia and the East African region by delivering sustainable, innovative, and high-quality solutions that exceed client expectations and create long-term value for communities and stakeholders.

🧭Mission

To provide reliable, efficient, and professional contracting, construction, engineering, water, logistics, procurement, and supply services through strong technical capacity, integrity, compliance, quality workmanship, innovation, and timely project delivery while ensuring customer satisfaction and sustainable development.

Our Core Values

Integrity

We uphold honesty, transparency, and ethical business practices.

Quality

We deliver services and projects that meet international standards.

Safety

We prioritize the health and safety of our staff, clients, and communities.

Innovation

We embrace modern solutions and continuous improvement.

Professionalism

We maintain excellence, accountability, and reliability in all operations.

Customer Satisfaction

We build long-term relationships through quality service delivery.

Our Team

HomeAbout UsOur Team
Meet the Team

A Multidisciplinary Workforce

AABOW GROUP OF COMPANIES is driven by a dedicated and highly experienced team committed to delivering quality, professionalism, and excellence in every project — qualified management, engineers, technical experts, finance professionals, procurement specialists, and operational staff.

Leadership

Mr. Abdiaziz Ahmed Hagi “Aabow”

General Manager — AABOW Group of Companies

The General Manager provides strategic leadership and operational oversight across all AABOW business lines — construction, water systems, logistics, procurement, real estate, and general supplies — ensuring effective decision-making, compliance, and the smooth execution of every project the company undertakes.

Management Team

Provides strategic leadership, operational oversight, and effective decision-making to ensure smooth execution of all company activities.

👷

Engineering & Technical Teams

Experienced civil, water, electrical, and construction professionals who maintain high standards of quality control, safety, and technical compliance.

📊

Finance & Accounting

Ensures strong financial management, transparency, budgeting, and accountability in all operations.

🚚

Procurement & Logistics

Manages sourcing, supply chain coordination, transportation, and timely delivery of materials and services.

🤝

HR & Administration

Supports staff development, compliance, coordination, and organizational effectiveness.

✅

Quality Management

A documented and effectively implemented Quality Management System (QMS) guided by our Quality Policy, procedures, and quality control records.

Why Choose Us

Why Choose AABOW Group of Companies

Our experience, technical capacity, and professionalism make us a trusted partner in construction, engineering, logistics, water systems, real estate, and general supply services across Somalia and the East African region.

  • ✓Proven experience in construction & infrastructure
  • ✓Strong technical and management capacity
  • ✓Commitment to quality, safety & professionalism
  • ✓Timely and efficient project delivery
  • ✓Transparent financial & operational systems
  • ✓Experienced engineers and skilled workforce
  • ✓Reliable procurement and logistics support
  • ✓Strong client relationships & customer satisfaction
  • ✓Compliance with international standards
  • ✓Sustainable and cost-effective solutions
